title: Transitions & Animations
content:
# HTML-CSS-Git Revision

*   **CSS Specificity:** Inline (1000) > ID (100) > Class (10) > Element (1). 
*   **Git Objects:** Blobs (file content) $\to$ Trees (directories) $\to$ Commits (history metadata).
*   **Merges:** Fast-Forward (moves pointer); Three-Way (creates merge commit for diverging branches).


*   **Transitions & Animations Checklist:** Verify input ranges and clear caches.
